description: Hourly poll at :25 (Tier P3 - Exposure / 8 streams). Pulls XSPM (Exposure Management) telemetry: MDE_XspmInitiatives_CL, MDE_ExposureSnapshots_CL, MDE_SecureScoreBreakdown_CL, MDE_ExposureRecommendations_CL, MDE_XspmAttackPaths_CL, MDE_XspmChokePoints_CL, MDE_XspmTopTargets_CL, MDE_SecurityBaselines_CL. Tier P3 = exposure posture.
